content:
🌟 clipboard-history | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: Managing and searching clipboard history on Linux systems.
✨ Key Features: • Remembers clipboard history across reboots • Saves images and arbitrary bytes • Searchable history with Regex or raw queries • Installable on any Linux system • Efficient storage using custom binary format
📖 Summary: Ringboard is a Rust-based clipboard manager for Linux that efficiently stores, searches, and retrieves clipboard history, including images and arbitrary data. It features a client-server architecture for composability and supports a large history size with minimal resource usage.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
